structured_payload_candidate.title: Local Setpoint Adjustment Limits
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Occupant setpoint adjustments are persistent offsets limited by absolute bounds: occupied cooling 22–27°C (72–80°F), occupied heating 18–22°C (65–72°F). Adjustments only affect occupied modes and are frozen during demand limiting.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Apply persistent offset within absolute limits; freeze adjustment during demand limiting; only affect occupied modes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: As a default, the active occupied cooling setpoint shall be lim ited between 22°C (72°F) and 27°C (80°F). As a default, the active occupied heating setpoint shall be limited between 18°C (65°F) and 22°C (72°F).
